standard.name: EN 15804+A2:2019
standard.pcr: PCR 2019:14, v1.3.4; C-PCR-003 Concrete and concrete elements (EN 16757), Version 2019-12-20

provenance.snippet:
CEN standard EN 15804 +A2:2019 serves as the core PCR
Product Category Rules (PCR) 2019:14 Construction products, Version 1.3.4
Complementary Product Category Rules (C-PCR) 003 to PCR 2019:14 Concrete and concrete elements (EN 16757)
The declared unit adopted is one cubic metre (1m3) of manufactured concrete.
Futurecrete Normal Class GL Slag 25 MPa ... Mix code SN252F100
This EPD report presents the methodology, data, results, and interpretation for concrete produced in South Australia.
GWP-total 143.83 GWP-fossil 143.73 GWP-biogenic 1.13E-01 GWP-luluc 1.77E-02 ... Mix code SN252F100
GWPfossil 9.64 GWP-biogenic 0.00 GWP-luluc 1.65E-05 GWP-total 9.64 ... Concrete produced at South Australia

A5.reason: Module A5 declared as X in system boundary table but no A5 GWP results table found in the document for mix SN252F100

C1.reason: C1-C4 and D declared in system boundary table as X but no separate results tables for these modules were found in the document for mix SN252F100

C2.reason: C1-C4 and D declared in system boundary table as X but no separate results tables for these modules were found in the document for mix SN252F100

C3.reason: C1-C4 and D declared in system boundary table as X but no separate results tables for these modules were found in the document for mix SN252F100

C4.reason: C1-C4 and D declared in system boundary table as X but no separate results tables for these modules were found in the document for mix SN252F100

D.reason: Module D declared in system boundary table as X but no separate results table for module D was found in the document for mix SN252F100

notes: This EPD covers a single mix: SN252F100 (Futurecrete Normal Class, GL Slag 25 MPa, South Australia). Other strength classes and blend types (20, 32, 40, 50 MPa with GP/GL cement, fly ash, slag, ternary blends) are described as being in scope but only SN252F100 results are presented in the environmental performance tables.
GWP-biogenic for A1-A3 is reported as 1.13E-01 = 0.113 kg CO2 eq.; GWP-luluc for A1-A3 is 1.77E-02 = 0.0177 kg CO2 eq.

Module A5 and modules C1-C4 and D are listed as declared (X) in the system boundary table (page 18), but no numerical LCA results tables for these modules were visible in the PDF for mix SN252F100. Only A1-A3 and A4 results tables were found.
The EPD title states 'SN252F100' which corresponds to Futurecrete Normal Class GL Slag 25 MPa in South Australia.
Compressive strength is 25 MPa based on product grouping; no test age (days) specified in the document.
Manufacturing location covers 10 sites across South Australia (Burton, Dry Creek, Gawler, Gillman, Littlehampton, Lonsdale, Murray Bridge, Sellicks, Victor Harbor, Welland).
